$comment: Layer C for SENIOR vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. SET SENIOR TO TRUE lowers to MOVE 1 TO WS-STATUS, so the flag is a constant on each path; Layer C enumerates the age>=65 and age<65 paths and proves the two impossible flag/discount combinations infeasible. It verifies the WS-AGE >= 65 branch boundary and the discount rounding half-boundary (WS-AMOUNT * 15 / 100) on the senior path.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SENIOR (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-senior)
